channel.title: Posts on Website of Dan Carpenter
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Website of Dan Carpenter

item.title: Converting UK grid references to points for mapping
item.description: Converting UK grid references for mapping The UK has a grid reference system for its spatial references (among others).

item.title: Deploying a Leaflet webmap on DigitalOcean
item.description: Creating and deploying webmaps using DigitalOcean Deploying things can seem quite hard.

item.title: Palmer Park leisure centre and biodiversity net gain
item.description: Introduction Palmer Park is in the Park ward of east Reading (UK).

item.title: Street trees and their benefits
item.description: Exploring the benefits of street trees with a Shiny app We receive an enormous number of benefits from trees.

item.title: Shiny apps on Digital Ocean
item.description: DigitalOcean This is a quick post to detail (perhaps a strong word) how I managed to deploy a Shiny app via the new DigitalOcean app platform.

item.title: Estimating carbon in priority habitats
item.description: Introduction A few weeks a go a wrote a short article for the Thames Valley Environmental Records Centre (TVERC) on the amount of carbon stored and sequestered by priority habitats in Berkshire and Oxfordshire.

item.title: Lichens in Sabah - geology and soils data
item.description: Introduction Back in 2012, shortly after the London Olympic Games, I led a small team of scientists from the Natural History Museum, London, on a field trip to Sabah, Malaysia.

item.title: Exploring UAV imagery in R
item.description: Introduction I am a bit obsessed with drones (UAVs) - for me they offer a world of possibilities for environmental scientists and ecologists.

item.title: Welcome to my new website!
item.description: Hello! I have finally got around to setting up my personal website.
